title: SaaS Application Development
description: Design and develop scalable SaaS platforms with modern frontend architecture and robust backend systems. I build complex business applications including dashboards, management systems, and real-time data interfaces using React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB.

title: Modern Frontend Development
description: Build high-performance, responsive, and accessible web interfaces using modern frontend technologies like React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and TypeScript. I focus on clean component architecture and reusable UI systems.

title: Full-Stack Web Application Development
description: Develop complete web applications from frontend to backend using the MERN stack. I design REST APIs, integrate databases, and build scalable application architectures using Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and modern frontend frameworks.

title: Dashboard & Admin Panel Development
description: Create powerful dashboards and admin panels with complex data visualization, charts, and analytics. I develop interactive business systems including reporting dashboards, management platforms, and workflow tools.

title: Micro-Frontend Architecture
description: Design and implement micro-frontend architectures that allow large applications to scale with independent modules and teams. This improves maintainability, deployment flexibility, and development speed.

title: API Development & Integration
description: Develop and integrate RESTful APIs for modern web applications. I build secure backend services and connect frontend applications with third-party APIs and internal systems.
